description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a pytest job that uses the rootproject/root-ubuntu16 image, runs sudo apt-get update -q, sudo apt-get install python-pip -yqq, pip install -r requirements_test.txt, export PYTHONPATH=/usr/local/lib/root:$PYTHONPATH, and python -m pytest -v, and stores the htmlcov/ directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that uses the alpine:latest image, depends on the pytest job, runs mv htmlcov public, publishes the public directory as an artifact, and only runs on the master branch. Also in the deploy stage add a pypi_production job that triggers only on tags matching /^\d+\.\d+\.\d+?$/ (semantic version tags), runs apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y ruby-dev, gem install dpl, and dpl --provider=pypi --distributions='sdist bdist_wheel' to publish the package to PyPI.
